#!/bin/bash
#----------------------------------------------------
# Auto-generated ChampSim job script
#   for TACC Lonestar6 SKX nodes
#----------------------------------------------------

#SBATCH -J {output_name}                        # Job name
#SBATCH -o {log_str}.o%j                        # stdout output file (%j = job ID)
#SBATCH -e {log_str}.e%j                        # stderr error file (%j = job ID)
#SBATCH -p {partition}                          # Queue (partition) name
#SBATCH -N 1                                    # Total # of nodes (must be 1 for serial)
#SBATCH -n {ntasks}                             # Total # of mpi tasks (should be 1 for serial)
#SBATCH -t {limit_hours}:00:00                  # Wall clock limit (hh:mm:ss)
#SBATCH --mail-user={mail}                      # Email address for notifications
#SBATCH --mail-type=all                         # Send email at begin and end of job
#SBATCH -A {account}                            # Allocation name

# First Executable Line
